steps.title: Close the quote and clause
steps.content: The blank closes Alfred Nobel's quoted phrase. The words after it begin another independent clause about judges recognizing François Mauriac in 1952.

steps.title: Join independent clauses
steps.content: Choice A adds an awkward and, after the quotation. Choice B creates a run-on, and Choice C creates a comma splice. A semicolon correctly links the general statement to the example that follows. The answer is D.
